data.body: PUSHED leaf 3863 as Gerrit change 748 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/748). Commit 0884dc85d; trailers rebar-ticket/Change-Id/Signed-off-by present; committer joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com. Pre-commit lint+typecheck passed. Full CI-equivalent xdist suite pre-flighted GREEN modulo env-only failures (jinja2 [ui] extra now installed -> 14 audit tests pass; 3 config = machine user-config; 1 identity leak = pre-existing xdist flake). Ticket 3863 stays in_progress until change 748 Verified+1. Now building stack: claiming 2ad8 (silverfish, coaching move) on top.
